office_does: The clerk administers court records, filings, exhibits, and related public access.
race_blurb: Incumbent Grace Cross faces Olivia Munsch.

candidates.summary: Incumbent clerk emphasizing trained staff, electronic filing, online records, access, and responsiveness.
highlights: Prioritizes electronic filing and online records [S2]

experience.basis: Incumbency and direct administration of the clerk's office support the proven-record pole.

candidates.summary: Challenger emphasizing plain-language procedures, accessible records and fees, feedback, and neutral service.
highlights: Calls for accessible procedures and records [S2]
